description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Clang Tests that runs on every push. The workflow consists of three jobs: osx-qmake, docker-qbs, and linux-qmake. The osx-qmake job runs on macos-10.15, installs Qt5, checks out the repository, and runs qmake and make with C++17 and C++14. The docker-qbs job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, and builds and tests with Docker. The linux-qmake job runs on various Linux hosts, caches and installs Qt, sets up Clang, checks out the repository, and runs qmake and make with different Qt versions and C++ standards.
